name: gradeVITian
subtitle: A product, not just a project
headline: The grade & attendance calculators tens of thousands of VIT students reach for every exam season —
headlineEmphasis: designed, shipped, and still run by me.
description: A high-traffic progressive web app for academic grade forecasting — GPA, CGPA, grade prediction, and attendance, with sub-second mobile loads and #2 Google ranking from programmatic SEO. Six years live, rebuilt on Next.js + FastAPI.
footnote: Milestones & achievements in the gallery · free, no sign-up at gradevitian.jayaremala.com
